summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Cockpit PND 2026-2030. 17/17 pytest backend tests passed (auth, filters, dashboard, actions CRUD with persistence, tree structure, analytics, alerts). Frontend Playwright e2e validated all 5 screens, inline editing, navigation, exports, alerts tabs, and logout.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend uses bcrypt with $2b$ format (verified), JWT 12h expiry, supports both cookie and Bearer header. Good.
seed_admin is idempotent and updates password if changed - good.
MongoDB _id is properly excluded via projection {'_id': 0} in all read endpoints.
ActionUpdate uses Optional fields; progress is clamped to [0,100] server-side which is correct.

CORSMiddleware is added AFTER app.include_router; in FastAPI middleware order is usually OK because middleware is applied at request entry regardless, but conventional best practice is to add CORS before routers. Not blocking.
No rate limiting / brute force lockout on /api/auth/login - playbook recommends 5-attempt lockout. Not implemented but not in original requirements.
Auth cookie set with samesite='none' + secure=True; frontend uses Bearer token in localStorage instead (per design note), so cookie is dormant. Acceptable.
seed_data_creation: 720 actions auto-seeded by backend on startup (6 pillars x 5 sectors x 3 effects x 2 products x 4 actions). Verified counts via /api endpoints.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints work via Bearer auth. Dashboard returns 720 total actions; pillar filter (?pillar=1) returns 120. Inline edit PUT /api/actions/{code} persists progress/status/title and clamps progress to [0,100]. Tree returns 6 pillars -> 5 sectors -> 3 effects -> 2 products -> 4 actions. Alerts has 3 categories with counts matching list lengths. Frontend testids match the spec. Initial console 401 from /api/auth/me on /login page is expected (no token yet).
